title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Goa Tourism

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Goa Tourism
jsonLd.description:
Goa Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Goa Tourism:
Goa Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism!
